title: Iron Golems Built Diffrent
description:
You know how you just pillar up and golems can't reach you?

Yeah not anymore
body:
**Iron Golems Built Different**

You know how you just pillar up and golems can't reach you?

Yeah not anymore

Now he stacks dirt. He builds bridges    He follows you like he's in a manhunt

You run  He builds  You die

 ![You run  He builds  You die ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43d35dba70631ce07ba1c913c0b55292899de6c1_0.webp)


**Good luck towering now**

**He brought blocks too**
